overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's neon-lit downtown district at night. The character traverses rain-slicked sidewalks reflecting vibrant holographic advertisements while towering skyscrapers loom overhead, with the camera tilting up dramatically to emphasize the vertical scale of the futuristic metropolis before returning to street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown sidewalk with traffic barriers

events.description: character briefly transitions to running before returning to walking pace

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk, passing orange traffic barriers and street trees while following a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white tank top walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: rain-slicked concrete sidewalk reflecting neon lights
orange metal barriers separating sidewalk from the street
trees in large concrete planters lining the right side
large vertical billboard with purple background and hand holding a drink
tall futuristic glass and steel buildings towering in the distance
modern street lamps with horizontal light bars

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet downtown sidewalk at night, passing orange traffic barriers on the left and tree planters on the right. Neon signs and holographic advertisements illuminate the scene, with the iconic Empathy billboard visible ahead on the left. The pavement reflects the vibrant cyan and pink neon lights from the surrounding buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial district with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk toward the towering skyscrapers, maintaining a steady walking pace

notable_agents.action: distant pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: floating holographic billboards and signs between buildings
ground-level shop entrances with bright neon signage

segments.scene_description: The character progresses deeper into the commercial district, approaching the massive skyscrapers. The Empathy billboard draws closer on the left, while holographic advertisements float in the air ahead. The street trees and traffic barriers have passed out of view, replaced by storefronts and building facades covered in neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon of skyscrapers viewed from below

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the towering skyscrapers and holographic billboards overhead

agents.ego_description: tilting the camera up to admire the scale of the surrounding megastructures and neon advertisements above

entered.detail: dark night sky visible between the towering buildings
countless illuminated windows and architectural lighting on skyscraper facades

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts dramatically upward, emphasizing the dizzying height of the surrounding megastructures. The view fills with towering glass skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements and countless illuminated windows. The street level disappears from view as the perspective focuses on the vertical canyon of neon-lit architecture against the night sky.

events.description: camera tilts back down to street level, revealing a pedestrian overpass ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk toward and under a yellow pedestrian bridge, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian crossing the street from left to right in front of the character

entered.detail: yellow elevated pedestrian walkway crossing over the street ahead
ground floor commercial establishments with illuminated entrances

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to street level, revealing a yellow pedestrian overpass ahead. The character walks toward and passes under this structure, while a pedestrian crosses the street from the left. The wet pavement and street-level storefronts return to view, with the Empathy billboard now visible at a medium distance on the left side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked downtown district that shifts from a street-level stroll to a dizzying vertical perspective before returning to the urban floor. It begins with the character walking past orange traffic barriers and tree planters, where cyan and pink neon lights reflect off the wet pavement toward a distant Empathy billboard. As the character progresses deeper into the commercial district, the greenery and barriers give way to dense storefronts and floating holographic advertisements. The camera then tilts dramatically upward, leaving the street behind to emphasize the towering glass skyscrapers and illuminated windows of a neon-lit architectural canyon. Finally, the perspective descends back to street level, following the character as they pass under a yellow pedestrian overpass while a passerby crosses the road.
